name: Salsa Escabeche Para Carne (Pickled Sauce For
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove seeds from the chiles and soak overnight.
2. Drain and grind with garlic and cumin.
3. Add vinegar, salt, bay leaf, thyme, onion, zucchini, peas, and potatoes to the ground mixture.
4. Allow the mixture to stand for one day or longer.
5. When serving with meat, add olive oil before using.
6. Garnish with thin slices of cream cheese.
Yield: 8-10 servings
